## Getting Started

1. Fork and clone the repo
2. `cd skills-v2 && pnpm install`
3. Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
4. Make changes in the files listed above
5. `pnpm test` to verify
6. `pnpm build` to ensure build passes
